title: pouteria minutiflora
intro: Pouteria minutiflora, also known as the Brazilian cherry or guanandi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The extracts of this plant have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties. The Pouteria minutiflora plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in some herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
